channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Clippers' James Harden delivers clear six-word response after stellar scoring performance
item.description: James Harden delivered a strong performance during the Los Angeles Clippers latest victory as the team tries to secure a playoff spot down the stretch.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Knicks star Jalen Brunson expected to miss at least 2 weeks with right ankle sprain
item.description: Jalen Brunson is expected to miss at least two weeks with a right ankle sprain, putting the New York Knicks in a tough spot as they try to maintain their position in the Eastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cal women fall to Notre Dame in ACC tournament, but Big Dance awaits Golden Bears
item.description: The Cal Bears put a scare into the No. 6 ranked Irish in the ACC tournament loss and will be back on the court soon for the NCAA Tournament as a likely No. 8 seed.
item.dc:creator: Mercury News staff and wire reports, The Mercury News

item.title: Shane Lowry likes it tough and builds a 2-shot lead at Bay Hill
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Shane Lowry loves the grind of a strong test and it's showing at Bay Hill. He had six birdies Friday in slightly tamer conditions for a 5-under 67, giving him a two-shot lead going into the weekend at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. It wasn't as cold as the day before.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Florida Panthers add veteran Brad Marchand as they gear up for run at another Stanley Cup title
item.description: The Florida Panthers welcomed the arrival of Boston Bruins captain Brad Marchand in a Friday trade that adds even more grit and experience to the Stanley Cup champions’ roster.
item.dc:creator: Alanis Thames, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Xander Schauffele makes a late push and extends his PGA Tour cut streak to 58 in a row
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — After two months without competition, PGA and British Open champion Xander Schauffele set modest expectations at Bay Hill and achieved one of his goals at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. He gets two more rounds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump admin investigation finds Maine Dept. of Education violated Title IX
item.description: On Feb. 25, the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services sent a notice of violation against the Maine Department of Education.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Mark Cuban tells Dallas TV station he would have asked for more in return for Doncic
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Former Dallas Mavericks majority owner Mark Cuban said he wouldn't have traded Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers without receiving much more in return.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lake Placid awaits word on whether it'll be picked as the Olympic sliding site for 2026 Games
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — Picture this: A sliding athlete wins an Olympic medal in Lake Placid next winter, then is chauffeured down to New York for an award ceremony at Rockefeller Center a few days later with thousands of people there to cheer on both moments. It could happen.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaun White kicks off new league with visions of snowboarding riches on the halfpipe
item.description: ASPEN, Colo. (AP) — Shaun White's next trick might carry more risk than the flips and twists he pulled off for decades inside all those halfpipes he used to dominate. This time, it's about making magic — and money — for the generation of snowboarders who looked up to him for all those years.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CFB recruiting: The top out-of-state defensive targets for Pac-12 legacy schools
item.description: USC has its eyes on the top linebacker in the country, Xavier Griffin, who committed to the Trojans months ago.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Cadillac F1 receives approval to enter global series as expanded 11th team in 2026
item.description: Cadillac's Formula 1 team received official approval Friday to join the grid in 2026 and its owners insist the team will be ready to compete.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: For some athletes, Olympic sliding in Lake Placid or Italy would both have comforts of home
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — Emily Sweeney is certain of having a home Olympics next winter. The USA Luge veteran is marrying fellow luge athlete Dominik Fischnaller later this year. He’s from Italy. She’s an American who lives in Lake Placid.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At beginning of tough stretch, Lakers show grit with overtime victory over Knicks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It is fitting that in a town built on movies and television, JJ Redick likes to use a popular directing term to refer to different moments in his first season as coach of the Los Angeles Lakers. On Thursday night, the Lakers provided Redick with another memorable callback moment.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Avalanche standout Cale Makar has 6-point game to break franchise record for defenseman
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The ever-modest Cale Makar did all he could to downplay his two-goal, four-assist night. It was a performance that just so happened to be the most productive offensive showing by a defenseman in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Outfielder Lawrence Butler agrees to $65.5 million, 7-year deal with A's, AP source says
item.description: A person with direct knowledge of the negotiations says outfielder Lawrence Butler has agreed to a $65.5 million, seven-year contract with the Athletics.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Stephen A. Smith agrees to new deal worth at least $100 million with ESPN: report
item.description: Stephen A. Smith and ESPN have reportedly agreed to keep the longtime journalist at the network for another five years in an extension worth at least $100 million.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Nesmith scores a career-high 27 points to lead Pacers past Bulls 127-112
item.description: Aaron Nesmith scored a career-high 27 points, Pascal Siakam added 20 and the Indiana Pacers defeated the Chicago Bulls 127-112 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
